title: Xaero Custom Waypoint Colors
description: Adds a color picker option to Xaero's Minimap waypoints, letting them go beyond the 16 preset colors.
body:
![Custom Color Selection](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6b60f67e17106bb18c5ed794cf6e0a4db9e813a.png) _This mod adds a custom color picker to Xaero's Minimap and World Map's waypoints because i didn't like only having 16 color presets for my waypoints._ *** **In the waypoint creation menu/editor, you can now choose a custom RGB color for your waypoints.** When you choose to use a custom color, a color picker menu appears, allowing you to choose the exact color you need. If you already have a specific color in mind, you can also copy and paste its hex code. If you want to change your custom color, simply click on the 'Custom:#HexCode' text again.
**If you experience any bugs or want to request a feature please report them on [GitHub](https://github.com/loooosh98/xaero-custom-waypoint-colors/issues)** ### ⚠️**This mod is not affiliated with nor endorsed by xaero96**
